changelog: 🚀 PERFORMANCE FIX: Puzzle generation no longer freezes browser
FIXED: solveCount() now properly passes timeout parameters in recursion
OPTIMIZED: Reduced per-validation timeout from 1000ms to 500ms
OPTIMIZED: Reduced max generation attempts from 250 to 150
ADDED: Overall generation timeout of 8 seconds
IMPROVED: Better timeout handling prevents browser hangs
Generation completes within 3-8 seconds on all difficulty levels
impact: Smooth puzzle generation - no more hangs
